products.title: The Reign Slip On - Navy
products.description: The Reign Slip-On is effortless by design. With a collapsible heel, minimalist silhouette, and leather-lined cushioned footbed, it’s built for all-day comfort and easy refinement. The low-profile Margom outsole, made from natural rubber, grounds the look in clean simplicity. From sock-off evenings to weekend coffee runs, it’s the go-anywhere essential—relaxed, refined, and quietly luxurious.

products.title: The Royale Knit 2.0 - Navy
products.description: The Royale Knit 2.0 is GREATS' lightweight classic, crafted with vegan materials and recycled plastic. Breathable, flexible, and easy to clean, it’s built for everyday adventure. Its featherweight knit upper keeps the iconic silhouette while minimizing bulk, and its durable construction wears as effortlessly as it moves—beat it up, wear it in, then simply rinse with soap and water.

products.title: The Greats E-Gift Card
products.description: Give the gift that’s sure to fit. Our digital gift card takes the guesswork out of gifting. You will receive an email with a unique code for your recipient to use at checkout. Our gift cards have no additional processing fees. This is a digital gift card, no physical gift card will be shipped.

products.title: Canvas Tote Bag
products.description: Personally tested by our team, this reusable tote has survived it all: crowded subways, photoshoots, hauling groceries, beach days, heading to the laundromat, for a weekend away - you get the idea. Made from cotton canvas, it's durable and lightweight and has passed the Brooklyn stamina test. Trust us, this isn't your parent's flimsy tote they received from a local convention.
